_comment: Hand-curated overlay merged with upstream Atomic Red Team data at build time. Hunt packs are arrays of strings (Splunk SPL, VQL, PowerShell).

splunk:
index=sysmon EventCode=1
  Image="*\\WINWORD.EXE" OR Image="*\\EXCEL.EXE"
| where match(CommandLine, "(?i)(cmd|powershell|wscript|cscript)")
| table _time, Computer, User, Image, CommandLine

index=sysmon EventCode=1
  ParentImage IN ("*\\WINWORD.EXE","*\\EXCEL.EXE","*\\OUTLOOK.EXE")
  Image IN ("*\\cmd.exe","*\\powershell.exe","*\\wscript.exe","*\\mshta.exe")
| table _time, Computer, User, ParentImage, Image, CommandLine
vql:
SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.EventLogs.EvtxHunter(
  EvtxGlob="**\\*.evtx", IdRegex="4688")
WHERE NewProcessName =~ "(?i)(WINWORD|EXCEL|OUTLOOK).EXE"

SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.System.Pslist()
WHERE ParentName =~ "(?i)(WINWORD|EXCEL|OUTLOOK).EXE"
  AND Name =~ "(?i)(cmd|powershell|wscript|cscript).exe"
powershell:
Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational'; Id=1} |
  Where-Object { $_.Message -match 'WINWORD.EXE|EXCEL.EXE' -and
    $_.Message -match 'powershell|cmd|wscript' } |
  Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List

Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\Microsoft\Office\Recent\" |
  Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending |
  Select-Object -First 20 FullName, LastWriteTime

splunk:
index=sysmon EventCode=1 Image="*\\powershell.exe"
| eval encoded=if(match(CommandLine,"(?i)-e(nc(odedcommand)?)? "),"YES","NO")
| table _time, Computer, User, CommandLine, encoded
| sort - encoded

index=wineventlog source="WinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-PowerShell/Operational" EventCode=4104
  Message IN ("*Invoke-Expression*","*DownloadString*","*EncodedCommand*","*AmsiScanBuffer*")
| rex field=Message "ScriptBlock text = (?P<script>.+?)\n"
| table _time, Computer, User, script
vql:
SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.EventLogs.PowerShell.ScriptBlock()
WHERE Script =~ "(?i)(invoke-expression|iex|downloadstring|encodedcommand|amsiscan|reflection.assembly)"

SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.System.Pslist()
WHERE Name =~ "powershell.exe"
  AND CommandLine =~ "(?i)(-enc|-e |encodedcommand|-nop|-noni|bypass)"
powershell:
Get-WinEvent -LogName 'Microsoft-Windows-PowerShell/Operational' |
  Where-Object { $_.Id -eq 4104 -and
    $_.Message -match 'EncodedCommand|DownloadString|Invoke-Expression|AmsiScan' } |
  Select-Object TimeCreated, @{N='Script';E={$_.Message -replace '.*ScriptBlock text = ',''
    -replace '\n.*',''}} | Format-List

Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Security'; Id=4688} |
  Where-Object {$_.Message -match 'powershell.exe.{0,100}-e'} |
  Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List

splunk:
index=sysmon EventCode=1
  ParentImage IN ("*\\winword.exe","*\\excel.exe","*\\outlook.exe")
  Image="*\\cmd.exe"
| table _time, Computer, User, ParentImage, CommandLine

index=sysmon EventCode=1 Image="*\\cmd.exe"
| stats count by Computer, User, ParentImage
| where count > 10
| sort - count
vql:
SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.System.Pslist()
WHERE Name =~ "cmd.exe"
  AND ParentName =~ "(?i)(WINWORD|EXCEL|OUTLOOK|mshta|wscript).exe"
powershell:
Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Security'; Id=4688} |
  Where-Object {$_.Message -match 'cmd.exe' -and
    $_.Message -match 'WINWORD.EXE|EXCEL.EXE|OUTLOOK.EXE'} |
  Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List

splunk:
index=sysmon EventCode=13
  TargetObject IN ("*\\CurrentVersion\\Run\\*","*\\CurrentVersion\\RunOnce\\*")
| table _time, Computer, User, TargetObject, Details, Image

index=sysmon EventCode=11
  TargetFilename="*\\Start Menu\\Programs\\Startup\\*"
| table _time, Computer, User, TargetFilename, Image
vql: SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.Sys.StartupItems()

SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.Registry.NTUser(
  KeyGlob="SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run**")
powershell:
Get-ItemProperty "HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run" | Format-List
Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run" | Format-List

Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\Microsoft\Windows\Start Menu\Programs\Startup\" |
  Select-Object FullName, LastWriteTime, Length

splunk:
index=sysmon EventCode=1 Image="*\\schtasks.exe" CommandLine="*/create*"
| table _time, Computer, User, CommandLine

index=wineventlog EventCode IN (4698, 4702)
| rex field=Message "Task Name:\\s+(?P<task>[^\\n]+)"
| table _time, ComputerName, EventCode, task, Message
vql:
SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.System.ScheduledTasks()
WHERE Enabled = "true"
  AND (Command =~ "(?i)(powershell|cmd|wscript|mshta|rundll32)"
    OR WorkingDirectory =~ "(?i)(temp|appdata|public)")
powershell:
Get-ScheduledTask | Where-Object {$_.State -ne 'Disabled'} |
  Select-Object TaskName, TaskPath, State,
    @{N='Execute';E={$_.Actions.Execute}},
    @{N='Trigger';E={$_.Triggers.CimClass.CimClassName}} |
  Format-List

Get-WinEvent -LogName 'Microsoft-Windows-TaskScheduler/Operational' |
  Where-Object {$_.Id -in @(106,129,200)} |
  Select-Object TimeCreated, Id, Message | Format-List

splunk:
index=sysmon EventCode=1 Image="*\\sc.exe" CommandLine="*create*"
| table _time, Computer, User, CommandLine

index=wineventlog EventCode=7045
| table _time, ComputerName, Message
| rex field=Message "Service Name:\\s+(?P<svc>[^\\n]+)"
| rex field=Message "Service File Name:\\s+(?P<path>[^\\n]+)"
vql:
SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.System.Services()
WHERE StartMode = "auto"
  AND (PathName =~ "(?i)(temp|appdata|users\\public)"
    OR NOT PathName =~ "(?i)(windows|program files)")
powershell:
Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System'; Id=7045} |
  Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List

Get-Service | Where-Object {$_.Status -eq 'Running'} |
  ForEach-Object { $svc = $_
    $bin = (Get-WmiObject Win32_Service -Filter "Name='$($svc.Name)'").PathName
    [PSCustomObject]@{Name=$svc.Name; Binary=$bin} } |
  Where-Object {$_.Binary -match 'temp|appdata|public'} | Format-List

splunk:
index=sysmon EventCode=13
  TargetObject IN ("*\\ms-settings\\shell\\open\\command*","*\\mscfile\\shell\\open\\command*")
| table _time, Computer, User, Image, TargetObject, Details

index=sysmon EventCode=1
  Image IN ("*\\eventvwr.exe","*\\fodhelper.exe")
  IntegrityLevel="High"
| table _time, Computer, User, Image, ParentImage, CommandLine
vql:
SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.Registry.NTUser(
  KeyGlob="SOFTWARE\\Classes\\ms-settings\\shell\\open\\command**")

SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.System.Pslist()
WHERE Name =~ "(?i)(eventvwr|fodhelper|sdclt|cmstp).exe"
powershell:
Get-ItemProperty "HKCU:\Software\Classes\ms-settings\shell\open\command" -EA SilentlyContinue | Format-List
Get-ItemProperty "HKCU:\Software\Classes\mscfile\shell\open\command" -EA SilentlyContinue | Format-List

Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Security'; Id=4688} |
  Where-Object {$_.Message -match '(eventvwr|fodhelper|sdclt).exe'} |
  Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List

splunk:
index=wineventlog EventCode=1102 OR EventCode=104
| table _time, ComputerName, EventCode, Message

index=sysmon EventCode=1
  Image="*\\wevtutil.exe" CommandLine IN ("*cl *","*clear-log*")
| table _time, Computer, User, CommandLine
vql:
SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.EventLogs.EvtxHunter(
  EvtxGlob="**\\Security.evtx", IdRegex="1102")

SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.System.Pslist()
WHERE CommandLine =~ "(?i)wevtutil.*(cl |clear-log)"
powershell:
Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Security'; Id=1102} |
  Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List

Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System'; Id=104} |
  Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List

splunk:
index=sysmon EventCode=8
| table _time, Computer, SourceImage, TargetImage, StartAddress, StartFunction

index=sysmon EventCode=1 Image="*\\mavinject.exe"
| table _time, Computer, User, CommandLine
vql: SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.Memory.InjectedThreads()

SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.System.Pslist()
WHERE CommandLine =~ "(?i)mavinject"
powershell:
Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational'; Id=8} |
  Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List

splunk:
index=sysmon EventCode=10 TargetImage="*\\lsass.exe"
  GrantedAccess IN ("0x1010","0x1038","0x1410","0x40","0x1FFFFF")
| table _time, Computer, SourceImage, TargetImage, GrantedAccess, User

index=sysmon EventCode=1
  Image IN ("*\\procdump.exe","*\\procdump64.exe") CommandLine="*lsass*"
| table _time, Computer, User, CommandLine
vql:
SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.Memory.ProcessHandles(
  ProcessRegex="lsass")
WHERE GrantedAccess =~ "(0x1010|0x1038|0x1410|0x1FFFFF)"

SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.Detection.Yara.Process(
  ProcessRegex="lsass",
  YaraRule="rule mimikatz { strings: $a = "mimikatz" nocase condition: $a }")
powershell:
Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational'; Id=10} |
  Where-Object {$_.Message -match 'lsass.exe'} |
  Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List

Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Security'; Id=4656} |
  Where-Object {$_.Message -match 'lsass.exe'} |
  Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List

splunk:
index=wineventlog EventCode=4769
  TicketEncryptionType="0x17" TicketOptions="0x40810000"
| stats count by TargetUserName, ServiceName, ClientAddress
| sort - count

index=wineventlog EventCode=4769 TicketEncryptionType="0x17"
| where ServiceName!="krbtgt" AND NOT ServiceName="*$"
| table _time, ComputerName, TargetUserName, ServiceName, ClientAddress
vql:
SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.EventLogs.EvtxHunter(
  EvtxGlob="**\\Security.evtx", IdRegex="4769")
WHERE TicketEncryptionType = "0x17"
  AND NOT ServiceName =~ "(krbtgt|\\$)"
powershell:
Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Security'; Id=4769} |
  Where-Object {$_.Message -match 'Ticket Encryption Type:\s+0x17'} |
  Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List

# Identify kerberoastable accounts (run on DC)
Get-ADUser -Filter {ServicePrincipalName -ne "$null" -and Enabled -eq $true} |
  Select-Object Name, SamAccountName, ServicePrincipalName | Format-Table

splunk:
index=sysmon EventCode=1
  Image IN ("*\\systeminfo.exe","*\\wmic.exe","*\\msinfo32.exe")
| table _time, Computer, User, Image, CommandLine, ParentImage
vql: SELECT * FROM Artifact.Generic.System.Info()

SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.System.Pslist()
WHERE Name =~ "(?i)(systeminfo|wmic|msinfo32).exe"
powershell:
Get-ComputerInfo | Select-Object WindowsProductName, OsVersion, CsName,
  CsDomain, CsManufacturer, BiosVersion | Format-List

Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Security'; Id=4688} |
  Where-Object {$_.Message -match '(systeminfo|wmic).exe'} |
  Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List

splunk:
index=sysmon EventCode=1
  Image IN ("*\\ipconfig.exe","*\\netstat.exe","*\\arp.exe","*\\net.exe","*\\nslookup.exe")
| table _time, Computer, User, Image, CommandLine, ParentImage
vql:
SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.Network.Netstat()
WHERE Status = "ESTABLISHED"
SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.Network.ArpCache()
powershell: Get-NetIPConfiguration | Select-Object InterfaceAlias, IPv4Address, IPv4DefaultGateway, DNSServer | Format-List

Get-NetTCPConnection | Where-Object {$_.State -eq 'Established'} |
  ForEach-Object { $proc = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -EA SilentlyContinue
    [PSCustomObject]@{ Process=$proc.Name; PID=$_.OwningProcess
      Remote="$($_.RemoteAddress):$($_.RemotePort)" } } | Format-Table

splunk:
index=sysmon EventCode=1
  Image="*\\net.exe" CommandLine IN ("*group*","*localgroup*")
| table _time, Computer, User, CommandLine

index=wineventlog EventCode IN (4798, 4799)
| table _time, ComputerName, SubjectUserName, TargetUserName, Message
vql:
SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.System.Pslist()
WHERE CommandLine =~ "(?i)net.*(group|localgroup).*(domain admins|enterprise admins|administrators)"
powershell:
Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Security'; Id=4798} |
  Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List

# Enumerate high-value groups (run as analyst on domain system)
Get-ADGroupMember "Domain Admins" -Recursive |
  Select-Object Name, SamAccountName, ObjectClass | Format-Table

splunk:
index=wineventlog EventCode=4624 LogonType=10
| table _time, ComputerName, TargetUserName, IpAddress, LogonType

index=wineventlog EventCode=4778
| table _time, ComputerName, AccountName, ClientName, ClientAddress
vql:
SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.EventLogs.EvtxHunter(
  EvtxGlob="**\\Security.evtx", IdRegex="4624")
WHERE LogonType = "10"

SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.Network.Netstat()
WHERE RemotePort = "3389"
powershell:
Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Security'; Id=4624} |
  Where-Object {$_.Message -match 'Logon Type:\s+10'} |
  Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List

Get-WinEvent -LogName 'Microsoft-Windows-TerminalServices-RemoteConnectionManager/Operational' |
  Where-Object {$_.Id -eq 1149} |
  Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List

splunk:
index=wineventlog EventCode=5140
  ShareName IN ("*\\ADMIN$","*\\C$","*\\IPC$")
| table _time, ComputerName, SubjectUserName, ShareName, IpAddress

index=wineventlog EventCode=7045
| rex field=Message "Service Name:\\s+(?P<svc>[^\\n]+)"
| table _time, ComputerName, svc, Message
vql:
SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.EventLogs.EvtxHunter(
  EvtxGlob="**\\Security.evtx", IdRegex="5140")
WHERE ShareName =~ "(ADMIN|C)\\$"

SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.System.Services()
WHERE StartMode = "Manual" AND State = "Running"
powershell:
Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Security'; Id=5140} |
  Where-Object {$_.Message -match 'ADMIN\$|C\$'} |
  Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List
Get-SmbOpenFile | Select-Object ClientComputerName, ClientUserName, Path | Format-Table

splunk:
index=sysmon EventCode=3
  DestinationPort IN (80, 443, 8080, 8443)
  Image!="*\\chrome.exe" Image!="*\\firefox.exe" Image!="*\\msedge.exe"
| stats count, dc(DestinationIp) as uniq_ips, avg(DestinationPort) as avg_port
    by Image, Computer
| sort - count

index=proxy sourcetype=web_traffic
| stats count, stdev(bytes) as jitter, avg(bytes) as avg_bytes
    by src_ip, dest_ip, dest_port
| where jitter < 200 AND count > 30
| sort - count
vql:
SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.Network.Netstat()
WHERE RemotePort IN ("80","443","8080","8443")
  AND NOT Process =~ "(?i)(chrome|firefox|edge|svchost|MicrosoftEdge).exe"

SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.System.DNSCache()
WHERE NOT Answer =~ "(?i)(microsoft|windows|google|akamai|cloudflare|cdn)"
powershell:
Get-NetTCPConnection -State Established |
  Where-Object {$_.RemotePort -in @(80,443,8080,8443)} |
  ForEach-Object { $proc = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -EA SilentlyContinue
    [PSCustomObject]@{ Process=$proc.Name; PID=$_.OwningProcess
      Remote="$($_.RemoteAddress):$($_.RemotePort)" } } |
  Where-Object {$_.Process -notmatch '(?i)(chrome|firefox|edge|svchost)'} | Format-Table

Get-DnsClientCache |
  Where-Object {$_.Data -notmatch '(?i)(microsoft|windows|google|akamai|cloudflare)'} |
  Select-Object Name, Data, TimeToLive | Format-Table

splunk:
index=sysmon EventCode=3 DestinationPort IN (20, 21, 69)
| table _time, Computer, User, Image, DestinationIp, DestinationPort

index=sysmon EventCode=1
  Image="*\\certutil.exe" CommandLine IN ("*-encode*","*-decode*","*-urlcache*")
| table _time, Computer, User, CommandLine
vql:
SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.Network.Netstat()
WHERE RemotePort IN ("20","21","69")

SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.System.Pslist()
WHERE CommandLine =~ "(?i)certutil.*(encode|decode|urlcache)"
powershell:
Get-NetTCPConnection |
  Where-Object {$_.RemotePort -in @(20,21)} |
  ForEach-Object { $proc = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -EA SilentlyContinue
    [PSCustomObject]@{Process=$proc.Name; RemoteIP=$_.RemoteAddress} } | Format-Table

Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Security'; Id=4688} |
  Where-Object {$_.Message -match 'certutil.*(encode|urlcache)'} |
  Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List

splunk:
index=sysmon EventCode=1
  Image IN ("*\\vssadmin.exe","*\\bcdedit.exe","*\\wbadmin.exe")
  CommandLine IN ("*delete*shadows*","*recoveryenabled*","*delete*catalog*")
| table _time, Computer, User, Image, CommandLine

index=sysmon EventCode=11
| stats count by Computer, Image
| where count > 500
| sort - count
vql:
SELECT * FROM Artifact.Windows.Forensics.Prefetch()
WHERE Executable =~ "(?i)(vssadmin|bcdedit|wbadmin|cipher)"
  AND Arguments =~ "(?i)(delete|recoveryenabled|catalog)"

SELECT count(FullPath) as total, split(FullPath,".")[-1] as ext
FROM glob(globs="C:\\Users\\**\\*")
GROUP BY ext
ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 30
powershell:
Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Security'; Id=4688} |
  Where-Object {$_.Message -match 'vssadmin.*delete|bcdedit.*recoveryenabled|wbadmin.*delete'} |
  Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List

# Look for mass file modification events
Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational'; Id=2} |
  Group-Object { $_.TimeCreated.ToString("HH:mm") } |
  Sort-Object Count -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 Name, Count | Format-Table
